history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A close-up, portrait-style, digital art illustration of a young man with long, dark brown hair tied into a high ponytail with a silver band. His hair is styled with loose strands framing his face. He has delicate features, large, expressive, amber-colored eyes with long lashes, a straight nose, and full lips. He is wearing traditional East Asian-inspired attire. The inner garment is dark blue with a subtle pattern of thin, wavy white lines. Over this, he wears a dark navy robe with a wide, ornate collar and lapel adorned with intricate gold swirling patterns and floral motifs. A lighter, flowing outer robe, possibly silk, in shades of grey and white with a marbled or water-like pattern, drapes over his shoulders. The background is a soft, blurred gradient of pale pink and light blue, suggesting a sunrise or sunset sky. The lighting is soft and diffused, highlighting the contours of his face and the textures of his clothing, creating a gentle, ethereal glow. The overall mood is serene, contemplative, and elegant, with a touch of fantasy or historical drama. The artist's signature "Xiao_Lingyue" is visible in a delicate script with a small pink butterfly in the lower left corner.
